message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)**

participant UC1
participant TCPClient
participant clientStructure

note over clientStructure : objectk of\nsockaddr_in

UC1 -> TCPClient : connectToServer(ipAddress, port)

note right of TCPClient #LightYellow : create a socket

TCPClient -> TCPClient : socket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
activate TCPClient
deactivate TCPClient

opt socket_ == -1
TCPClient -->> UC1 : return -1 (socket create faild)
end

TCPClient -> clientStructure : clientStructure()

clientStructure -> TCPClient : clientStructure.sin_family = AF_INET;

clientStructure -> TCPClient : clientStructure.sin_port = htons(port);

note left of clientStructure #LightYellow : linking ipAddress to clientstructure\nusing AF_INET standart

TCPClient -> TCPClient : inet_pton(AF_INET, ipAddress.c_str(),\n  &clientStructure.sin_addr);
activate TCPClient
deactivate TCPClient

TCPClient -> TCPClient : connectRes = connect(socket_, (sockaddr*)&clientStructure,\n  sizeof(clientStructure));
activate TCPClient
deactivate TCPClient

opt connectRes == -1
TCPClient -->> UC1 : return -1 (faild to connect)
end

TCPClient ->x clientStructure
TCPClient -->> UC1 : return 0 (connected)

@enduml
```
